note: This data includes pre-trial detainees; foreign nationals tend to be a larger share of people in pre-trial detention than of sentenced prisoners. Countries with high volumes of cross-border travel/work also tend to have higher shares of prisoners born in another country.
title: Share of prisoners that were born in another country
subtitle: Share of prisoners who were not born in the country in which they are detained, regardless of whether they have citizenship in that country. One datapoint is shown per country, from 2004 onwards.
